ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in minutes */,
  "time_of_day" INTEGER /* Time of day the game was played (0 = day, 1 = night) */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opposing team */,
  "won" INTEGER /* Whether the game was won (1) or lost (0) */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Away team */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "umpires" TEXT /* Names of the umpires officiating the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Player's position (e.g., pitcher, batter) */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Player's birth date */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "height" REAL /* Player's height in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in pounds */,
  "bats" TEXT /* Whether the player bats left or right */,
  "throws" TEXT /* Whether the player throws left or right */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batting_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batting statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "rbi" INTEGER /* Number of runs batted in */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average */,
  "on_base_percentage" REAL /* On-base percentage */,
  "slugging_percentage" REAL /* Slugging percentage */,
  "on_base_plus" REAL /* On-base plus slugging */,
  "innings" INTEGER /* Number of innings the player batted */,
  "singles" INTEGER /* Number of singles */,
  "doubles" INTEGER /* Number of doubles */,
  "triples" INTEGER /* Number of triples */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts */,
  "hit_by_pitch" INTEGER /* Number of times hit by pitch */,
  "sacrifice_bunts" INTEGER /* Number of sacrifice bunts */,
  "sacrifice_flies" INTEGER /* Number of sacrifice flies */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases */,
  "caught_stealing" INTEGER /* Number of times caught stealing */,
  "ground_into_double_play" INTEGER /* Number of times grounded into a double play */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batting_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batting_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fielding_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fielding statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "putouts" INTEGER /* Number of putouts */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "innings_pitched" REAL /* Number of innings pitched */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs allowed */,
  "strikes_by_contact" INTEGER /* Number of strikes by contact */,
  "strikes_swinging" INTEGER /* Number of strikes swinging */,
  "strikes_looking" INTEGER /* Number of strikes looking */,
  "grounded_balls" INTEGER /* Number of grounded balls */,
  "fly_balls" INTEGER /* Number of fly balls */,
  "line_drives" INTEGER /* Number of line drives */,
  "errors" INTEGER /* Number of errors */,
  "double_plays" INTEGER /* Number of double plays turned */,
  "triple_plays" INTEGER /* Number of triple plays turned */,
  "passed_balls" INTEGER /* Number of passed balls */,
  "wild_pitches" INTEGER /* Number of wild pitches */,
  "fielding_percentage" REAL /* Fielding percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fielding_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fielding_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the team plays */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the team's manager */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role link */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Read status of the notification (0 = unread, 1 = read) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
